source.build_method: Mean-pooled and re-normalized embeddings of top-100 exemplars per cell. Built from ALL exemplars (no holdout); the eval result was computed separately on a 20% holdout from the same exemplar set.

meta.note: Keys converted OP(Stance, Site) → OP_Stance_Site; ALT/SUP renamed to eoreader4 DEF/EVA (same mode×domain×stance×site). Vectors are unit-norm, copied unchanged from the verified source.
